name: Classic Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Render the salt pork in butter in a saucepot over medium heat until partially rendered.
2. Add onion, carrot, and celery to the pot. Heat and stir for 6-8 minutes until slightly softened.
3. Mix in flour and stir until a roux reaches a light golden brown color.
4. Gradually add white stock, bringing it to a boil.
5. Stir in tomatoes and tomato puree, returning to a boil, then reduce to a simmer.
6. Tie seasonings (bay leaf, garlic, thyme, peppercorns) in cheesecloth to form a sachet.
7. Add the sachet to the sauce and simmer for 60-90 minutes until desired consistency is reached.
8. Remove and discard the cheesecloth sachet.
9. Strain the sauce through a chinois.
10. Add sugar and season with salt to taste.
